name: Black and White Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Walnuts Or Pecans, Can Be Omitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. In a large bowl, combine sugars, butter and shortening; beat until light and fluffy. Add vanilla and egg; blend well.
2. Gradually add flour, baking soda and salt; mix well. Stir in chocolates and nuts.
3. Drop dough by tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
4. Bake for 9 to 12 minutes or until light golden brown. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
